brand.name: CareerFlow
brand.description: Capture achievements continuously, generate resumes instantly

hero.title: Your Achievements, Always Ready
hero.subtitle: Stop stressing over resumes. Upload your old resume or connect Notion—AI extracts your career highlights. Generate tailored resumes whenever you need.
hero.upload_hint: PDF or Word, no signup required

achievement_bank.title: Achievement Bank
achievement_bank.desc: AI extracts career highlights from resumes and Notion, organized by impact, ready to use

one_click_resume.title: One-Click Resume
one_click_resume.desc: Paste job description, AI matches relevant achievements, generates tailored resume

always_ready.title: Always Prepared
always_ready.desc: Whenever opportunity knocks, your career story is ready to go

jd_panel.title: Job Description (Optional)
jd_panel.placeholder:
